use_codes.desc: INHIBITION OF PREMATURE LH SURGES IN WOMEN UNDERGOING CONTROLLED OVARIAN HYPERSTIMULATION WITH FSH

indications.text:
161 Antagonä (ganirelix acetate) Injection is indicated for the inhibition of premature LH
162 surges in women undergoing controlled ovarian hyperstimulation.
